title: Final Legal Move
description:
Final Legal Move is a survival tactics game built on chess movement with a twist.

You control a single white piece while black pieces keep closing in. 

Play through a series of escalating story scenarios. One stage may give you extra moves, another may flood the board with fresh enemies, and another may change your piece form every turn! 

 

Test yourself in Survive mode.

Last as long as possible while enemy waves scale up, hazard tiles appear, timers tighten, and fairy pieces enter the pool. 

Earn coins, unlock new forms, and choose upgrades that reshape each run~

Features• Survival-focused chess tactics

• Story stages with rule twists, secrets

• Endless mode with score chasing, in and out of match upgrades

• Classical and fairy chess pieces including Camel, Archbishop, Chancellor, and Amazon

• Special board tiles such as double moves, walls, wards, and moving crosses

• In-game encyclopedia for pieces, items, and endless upgrades

• Map editor for making your own stage

• More to come!
description_short: Survive a hostile chessboard where you are the only white piece. Escape enemy waves, get power ups, clear story campaign and chase high scores in endless mode. Make your final legal move.
